name: wdk-wallet-web
description: Self-custodial multi-chain WDK wallet starter for the web (Next.js). Web counterpart to tetherto/wdk-starter-react-native.

scripts.//typecheck: The Next app type-checks against @wdk-web/wallet-core's emitted dist/*.d.ts (its package exports point at dist), so the core must be built before any consumer's tsc runs. pnpm -r build is topological; build the core first, then type-check the workspace.
